description: Market Regime Risk Score (0-100). Higher = more bullish.
rationale: Hybrid config: Trend=0.4 (Separation), Risk=0.4 (Speed), Liq=0.2 (Support). Tight VIX for fast crash detection. Validated: Cohen D=2.24, GFC Lag=10d, Fitness=0.793.

trend.description: SPY price vs 200-day SMA. Primary Separation Driver.

liquidity.description: Fed Net Liquidity 10-day slope. Supporting role with fast lookback.

risk_appetite.description: VIX + HY Spread. Primary Speed Driver with tight thresholds.
